title: Webhook to get notification when Board or Group is created

posts.author: cs_gwl (cs_gwl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
I am looking to automate a workflow where in notifications will be generated when a new board or a new group inside the board is created.
I have went through the api documentation for webhook but could not find any event for board creation or group creation.

Is there any webhook for Board and Group Creation?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @cs_gwl

Welcome to the community. Unfortunately there is no such webhook. The only webhooks available are those listed in the documentation.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve gone ahead and put this in the “Feature Feedback” section as a new feature request, so other users can vote for it.
